options-page.admission-process-option-description: How to apply? Where to apply? What should you do before and after you apply?
options-page.admission-requirements-option-descriptio: What are the required documents? What are the age requirements?
options-page.admission-fees-option-description: How much are the tuition fees for each grade? What are the payment methods? Are there any discounts?

admission-process-page.fill-an-application-description: You can apply online by clicking the button below, or visit the schools reception to fill the application in person.
admission-process-page.attend-your-interview-description: we will directly review your application and book an appointment for the interview with both the parents and the students. Interviews with students could involve entry level tests according to the educational stage of the student and his/her origin school.
admission-process-page.follow-up-description: After the interview, the students affairs department will get in touch with the accepted applicants to start the registration process, which include providing the required documents and paying the tuition fees.

options-page.inside-egypt-option-description: Information about admission requirements for students inside Egypt
options-page.outside-egypt-option-description: Information about admission requirements for students outside Egypt
options-page.outside-egypt-foreigners-option-descript: Information about admission requirements for foreign students outside Egypt

admission-requirements-note-list: After passing the entry tests, the following documents will be requested for the registration process.
The National and the International Departments request the same documents. However, students applying for the International department in upper stages should provide educational Sequence certificates
Online transfer is a process done by the School students originally came from

from-kg-2-to-junior-6-requirements-list: Old School transfer form & new Stage form

from-preparatory-1-to-preparatory-3-requ: Old School transfer form & new Stage form

from-senior-1-to-senior-3-requirements-l: Old School transfer form and new Stage form

admission-requirements-note-list: After passing the entry tests, the following documents will be requested for the registration process.

The National and the International Departments request the same documents. However, students applying for the International department in upper stages should provide educational Sequence certificates stamped by the Egyptian Ministry of Foreign Affairs.

After taking official acceptance from the student affairs department parents should fill the "Returning/Coming to Egypt Form" from the Egyptian Ministry of Foreign Affairs. This form requires 2 personal photos and a certificate of the last stage the student passed.

from-kg-2-to-junior-6-requirements-list: Last stage certificate stamped by the Egyptian Ministry of Foreign Affairs

from-preparatory-1-to-preparatory-3-requ: Last stage certificate stamped by the Egyptian Ministry of Foreign Affairs

from-senior-1-to-senior-3-requirements-l: Last stage certificate stamped by the Egyptian Ministry of Foreign Affairs

admission-requirements-note-list: After passing the entry tests, the following documents will be requested for the registration process.

The National and the International departments request the same documents. However, students applying for International departments in upper stages should provide educational sequence certificates stamped by the Egyptian Ministry of Foreign Affairs.

After taking official acceptance from the student affairs department parents should fill the "Returning/Coming to Egypt Form" from the Egyptian Ministry of Foreign Affairs. This form requires 2 personal photos and a certificate of the last stage the student passed.
Parents should provide recent passports and personal ID's for the students affairs department.

from-kg-2-to-junior-6-requirements-list: Last stage certificate stamped by the Egyptian Ministry of Foreign Affairs

from-preparatory-1-to-preparatory-3-requ: Last stage certificate stamped by the Egyptian Ministry of Foreign Affairs

from-senior-1-to-senior-3-requirements-l: Last stage certificate stamped by the Egyptian Ministry of Foreign Affairs
